titleStmt.title: SII 19.60: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 60. (A.R. No. 582 of 1920.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

summary.p: This is incomplete. It registers an endowment of land made after purchase ing the same from the sabhā of the eastern portion (kīḻai-kaṇḍam) of Parakēsarichchēri, by Mūttaṉ Kāmaṉ alias Nārā[ya*]ṇa-Viḻuppērarayaṉ for the daily offering of a sweet dish called akkāraḍiyal to the god. The ingredients for this preparation are given as follows: rice-4 nāḻi: dol-2 nāḻi: milk-4 nāḻi: ripe plantains-10: sugar-14 palam: and ghee-1 uḻakku.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīviranārā yaṇaccaturvvedimaṅgalattu tiruvanan=teśvarattu bhaṭṭārakarai candrādityavat niyatam Akkāraṭiyallamutu ceyvataṟku mūttaṉ kāmaṉāṉa nārāyaṇaviḻupperāyaṉ Ivvūr parakesaricceri kiḻaikaṇ
ṭattu sabhai yārpakkal vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta nilattāl nittam nāṉāḻi yariciyum parup pirunāḻiyum pāl nāṉāḻiyum vāḻaippaḻam pattum carkkarai [10 4]palam ney Uḻa kk Um Orumaiyuḷ Akkāraṭalaikku nikkiniṉṟa Iraṇṭu nontā viḷakk UThe sequence in the mention of 2 perpetual lamps followed by a reference to land is not clear in the absence of the continuation to the record.Iṉṉilam viranārāyaṇacceri kurovi nārāyaṇakramavi
Digital edition of SII 19.60 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
